candidates.name: Email Warmup Domain Health Monitor
candidates.pitch: Analyzes email header data from a connected inbox to surface open rates, bounce rates, and spam score indicators for the user's sending domain, overlaying health metrics in Gmail. Free basic dashboard
candidates.pain: Sales teams sending cold email from their own domain have no visibility into whether their emails are landing in spam, damaging sender reputation silently.

candidates.name: Design Handoff Color Comparator
candidates.pitch: Lets users sample a color from any page element and compare it against a Figma screenshot pasted into the extension, showing delta-E difference and RGB/HEX mismatch percentage. Free basic comparison,
candidates.pain: Frontend developers manually compare colors between Figma screenshots and live implementation, spending time on tedious visual checks instead of coding.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: Playwright Script Recorder
candidates.pitch: Records user interactions on any page and generates runnable Playwright scripts, exporting to clipboard with one click. Free recording and basic export, paid adds advanced selectors, assertions, and C
candidates.pain: QA engineers manually write Playwright tests for UI flows they already test manually, duplicating effort that could be automated instantly.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: Webhook Retry Lab
candidates.pitch: Takes a webhook URL and payload, replays it with configurable retry count and backoff strategies, and shows response timing, status codes, and retry sequence in a visual timeline. Free basic replay wi
candidates.pain: Developers manually craft scripts or use Postman to test webhook retry logic, lacking a visual tool to simulate backoff and failure scenarios.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: A/B Variant Session Overlay
candidates.pitch: Reads URL params and localStorage to determine variant assignment, overlays a small badge showing current variant and allows quick comparison of conversion metrics across variants. Free for basic vari
candidates.pain: Marketers waste time manually checking URL params and cookies to know which A/B variant a user is seeing during testing.

candidates.name: Sitemap Depth Analyzer
candidates.pitch: Crawls visible links from the current page and calculates depth, internal linking gaps, and orphan page risks, overlaying a depth badge on each internal link. Free basic depth stats, paid for full cra
candidates.pain: SEO specialists and content teams lack visibility into how deep their pages are in the site hierarchy, affecting crawl budget and link equity distribution.

candidates.name: Sentry Error Aggregator
candidates.pitch: Collects all Sentry error IDs and fingerprints from console logs and network responses on the current page, deduplicating and displaying a mini dashboard with stack trace snippets and grouping. Free b
candidates.pain: Developers debugging production bugs see scattered error IDs in console and network tabs with no way to group and prioritize them in one view.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.pitch: Scrapes PagerDuty incident links and numbers from any page context, fetching incident metadata via the PD public API to overlay severity, affected services, and runbook links inline. Free basic extrac
candidates.pain: On-call engineers context-switch to Slack, Jira, or email to find incident links and runbooks when an alert fires, losing precious incident response time.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.pain: Developers reviewing unfamiliar codebases lose time checking whether functions on screen are documented without context switching to an IDE.

candidates.name: LLM Prompt Version History Vault
candidates.pitch: Captures prompts and model outputs in real-time from any AI chat interface, storing them locally with full-text search and diff view. Free tier: 100 entries, basic search. Paid: unlimited storage, tag
candidates.pain: Users iterating on prompts lose track of earlier versions and cannot compare outputs across model configurations, wasting expensive API calls on already-tested prompts.
